Mentions Timeline (11 articles)
3310-09-19
Thargoid Fleet Invades Shinrarta Dezhra
A Thargoid invasion fleet emerges in Shinrarta Dezhra, catching AX forces by surprise. Jameson Memorial is damaged but holds, while Aegis focuses on frontline Titans and Sirius/Azimuth provide support.
3309-07-20
Azimuth Releases New AX Weapon
Azimuth's convention succeeds and the new Overcharged Gimballed AX Multi-Cannon with Auto Loader is released, with speculation about Holloway Bioscience Institute collaboration.
3309-07-13
Deliver Rarities for Azimuth Event
Azimuth requests rare commodities for its business convention and offers pre-engineered AX Multi-Cannons as rewards, while Corcoran criticizes the company's war escalation history.
3309-01-12
Azimuth Announces Experimental Weapons Stabiliser
Azimuth Biotech unveils its experimental weapons stabiliser at the TZ Arietis Weapon Expo and condemns Admiral Tanner's recent presidential pardon.
3309-01-09
Admiral Tanner Receives Presidential Pardon
President Zachary Hudson grants Admiral Aden Tanner a full presidential pardon, overturning his court martial and reinstating him into the Federal Navy.
3308-11-10
Azimuth Claim Expensive Success
The recent Azimuth Biotech initiative to expand its operation assets has been described as a ‘partial success’.
3308-11-03
Azimuth to Expand Operational Assets
Azimuth Biotech has announced a campaign in the Wandrama system to expand its military and surface facility capacity.
3308-07-14
Pilots Urged to Defend Proteus Wave Project
Azimuth calls for reinforcements to defend the Proteus Wave after saboteurs delay construction and Thargoid attacks intensify.
3308-06-30
Salvation Prepares 'Final Thargoid Battlefield'
Salvation announces the Proteus Wave construction in HIP 22460, declaring it will be the final battlefield to eradicate Thargoids from the galaxy, with superpower navies and Azimuth megaships mobilising for the operation.
3308-03-23
Taurus Mining Ventures Begins Scientific Study
Taurus Mining Ventures begins research in Synuefe on a Guardian-related site for Salvation.
3308-01-05
Ram Tah’s Revelations Halt Court Martial
Ram Tah's testimony about Salvation's Guardian-based superweapon suspends Admiral Tanner's court martial.
